narrative:
Precinct Mississinawa Township (precinct in Darke County) has 467 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
